traffic.title: Traffic Monitor
traffic.source: Data source: CC Switch proxy logs
traffic.noData: No traffic data available. Is CC Switch configured?

help.providers: View all API providers configured in CC Switch. Click 'Activate' to switch Claude Code's current API provider — the change takes effect immediately without restarting Claude Code.
help.traffic: Real-time traffic monitoring from CC Switch proxy logs. View token consumption, cost, cache hits, error rates, latency stats, and request history. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds. All data is real — no simulated data.
help.dashboard: View RAgent Router's routing decision statistics, including request count, token consumption, model distribution, and cost trends. Shows RAgent Router's own request records.
help.settings: System status overview, CC Switch proxy configuration, appearance settings (theme/language), backend service configuration, log paths, and application information.

providers.title: API Providers
providers.source: Data source: CC Switch local database

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noData: No data available. Is the backend running?

settings.title: Settings
settings.closeToTray: Close to system tray instead of quitting
settings.onlyDesktop: Settings are only available in the desktop (Electron) app.
